news.title:
MTAR Technologies Ltd secures Rs. 35.6 Cr order for energy sector data center projects.
Order from an international entity to be executed by Dec 2026; additional orders expected.
news.summary:

news.title:
Defence stocks like Mazagon Dock, MTAR Tech dropped up to 11% despite Iran-Israel war.
War's third week showed counterintuitive trends, failing to boost defence sector stocks.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like Mazagon Dock, MTAR Tech dropped up to 11% despite Iran-Israel war.
War's third week showed counterintuitive trends, failing to boost defence sector stocks.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies benefits from India's plan to build 20 nuclear reactors, securing significant orders and projecting Rs. 5,250 crore revenue from nuclear projects.
MTAR posted record Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 278 crore, with clean energy and aerospace segments showing strong growth bolstered by capacity expansions.
news.summary:
MTAR Technologies benefits from India's plan to build 20 nuclear reactors, securing significant orders and projecting Rs. 5,250 crore revenue from nuclear projects.
MTAR posted record Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 278 crore, with clean energy and aerospace segments showing strong growth bolstered by capacity expansions.

news.title:
MTAR Tech and Bharat Forge hit 52-week highs amid US-Iran conflict.
Defence stocks show strong performance as geopolitical tensions rise.
news.summary:
MTAR Tech and Bharat Forge hit 52-week highs amid US-Iran conflict.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies expects a 40% revenue CAGR and a 300 bps margin rise in three years.
The company plans to cut working capital days to below 200.
news.summary:

news.title:
Motilal Oswal forecasts 31% upside for MTAR Tech, setting a target price of Rs 4,810.
MTAR benefits from Bloom Energy's 3-5 GW orders, with Rs 2,700-5,300 crore inflows expected.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal forecasts 31% upside for MTAR Tech, setting a target price of Rs 4,810.

news.title:
Leelavathi Parvatha Reddy, promoter of MTAR Technologies Ltd, acquired 2.97 lakh shares via inter-se transfer as a gift.
The transfer involved 2 lakh shares from P. Srinivas Reddy and 97,000 shares from Saranya Loka Reddy, both promoters.
news.summary:
Leelavathi Parvatha Reddy, promoter of MTAR Technologies Ltd, acquired 2.97 lakh shares via inter-se transfer as a gift.
The transfer involved 2 lakh shares from P. Srinivas Reddy and 97,000 shares from Saranya Loka Reddy, both promoters.

news.summary: MTAR Technologies warns COO for violating insider trading regulations.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies reported insider trading policy violations by Deputy GM Mutyala Reddy.
Reddy admitted inadvertent violations; profits disgorged to SEBI fund, strict warning issued.
news.summary:
MTAR Technologies reported insider trading policy violations by Deputy GM Mutyala Reddy.
Reddy admitted inadvertent violations; profits disgorged to SEBI fund, strict warning issued.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies drives AI-led data center growth, boosting sectors like power, clean energy, and manufacturing.
India's data center market is small, but global demand, led by the US, is rapidly expanding.
news.summary:
MTAR Technologies drives AI-led data center growth, boosting sectors like power, clean energy, and manufacturing.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies reported robust Q3 FY26 results with INR278 crore revenue, marking a 59% YoY growth, and EBITDA of INR64 crore, up 92.5%.
The company achieved record order inflows in clean energy and nuclear sectors, with a Q3 order book of INR2,394 crore and plans for capacity expansion to meet rising demand.
news.summary:
MTAR Technologies reported robust Q3 FY26 results with INR278 crore revenue, marking a 59% YoY growth, and EBITDA of INR64 crore, up 92.5%.
The company achieved record order inflows in clean energy and nuclear sectors, with a Q3 order book of INR2,394 crore and plans for capacity expansion to meet rising demand.

news.summary: MTAR Technologies gained nearly 4% as defence stocks rise ahead of Budget 2026.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies' Q3 net profit surged to ₹352M from ₹163M YoY.
Revenue rose significantly to ₹2.8B from ₹1.7B YoY, reflecting robust growth.

The call will discuss operational and financial performance with key management participation.
